home.title: World of Wood Decoration — International Wood Architecture Company
home.description: An international production company creating exclusive architectural works in natural wood for palaces, villas, mosques, hotels, and public buildings worldwide.

about.title: About — World of Wood Decoration
about.description: For three decades we have transformed natural wood into architecture. Discover the company, production, and philosophy behind the world's finest wooden interiors.

projects.title: Projects — World of Wood Decoration
projects.description: A private portfolio of palaces, grand mosques, five-star hospitality, and country estates finished in bespoke architectural wood.

services.title: Services — World of Wood Decoration
services.description: Architectural design, master joinery, hand carving, marquetry, restoration, and turnkey interior delivery for the world's most demanding commissions.

contact.title: Contact — World of Wood Decoration
contact.description: Tell us about your project and we will prepare a bespoke proposal. Reach us through your preferred channel.

gallery.title: Gallery — World of Wood Decoration
gallery.description: A curated visual gallery of architectural joinery — interiors, furniture, sacred spaces, and the craftsmanship of our company.

privacy.title: Privacy — World of Wood Decoration
privacy.description: How the company collects, uses, and protects your information, and the terms on which this website is provided.

hero.descriptionLead: an international production company crafting exclusive works in natural wood for villas, palaces, mosques, hotels, restaurants, and public buildings worldwide.

philosophy.title: Wood elevated to architecture.
philosophy.paragraph1: World of Wood Decoration is not a furniture house. We are an international production company that treats wood as a structural, sculptural, and spiritual material — as stone was treated in the age of cathedrals.
philosophy.paragraph2: Every commission begins with one question: what will endure a century? From that answer we source rare timber, engineer it to serve generations, and finish every surface entirely by hand.

0.title: Rarity
0.text: Single-origin timber, selected board by board from sustainable estates and heritage reserves.

1.title: Precision
1.text: Joinery engineered to micron tolerances, designed from within and assembled without visible fixings.

2.title: Longevity
2.text: Interiors built to be inherited — restored, not replaced, from generation to generation.

services.title: Every discipline — under one roof.
services.description: From the first architectural sketch to the final hand-applied finish, every craft lives within our workshops, so nothing is outsourced and nothing is compromised.

0.title: Architectural design
0.text: Bespoke interior architecture in wood — ceilings, screens, staircases, and monumental joinery conceived alongside your architect.

1.title: Master joinery
1.text: Structural cabinetry, panelling, and doors engineered to museum tolerances and assembled by hand.

2.title: Hand carving & marquetry
2.text: Relief carving, mashrabiya, and inlaid marquetry executed by carvers with decades of experience.

3.title: Sacred & ceremonial
3.text: Mihrabs, minbars, doors, and ceilings for mosques and ceremonial spaces of national significance.

4.title: Heritage restoration
4.text: Conservation and revival of historic interiors with timber, tools, and techniques matched to the original hand.

5.title: Turnkey delivery
5.text: Global project management, logistics, and on-site installation by our own teams of master craftsmen.

serviceCards.title: Every discipline in natural wood — under one roof
serviceCards.description: From architectural concept and 3D visualization to production, delivery, and installation — we create exclusive works in natural wood for private homes, palaces, hotels, restaurants, mosques, and public buildings.

0.title: Luxury interiors
0.text: Ceilings, panelling, staircases, columns, and architectural elements for palaces, villas, and private residences.

1.title: Gazebos & pavilions
1.text: Garden gazebos and architectural pavilions in noble timber for private and public spaces.

2.title: Doors & portals
2.text: Monumental entrance doors, portals, and arches with carving, bronze, and concealed mechanisms.

3.title: Solid wood furniture
3.text: Bespoke furniture and cabinetry in solid wood — from individual pieces to complete suites.

4.title: Islamic & Eastern décor
4.text: Mihrabs, minbars, mashrabiya, and calligraphic panels following historic geometry.

5.title: Commercial projects
5.text: Hotels, restaurants, boutiques, and representative spaces — wooden architecture for brands.

projects.title: Projects that become part of history
projects.description: Our portfolio includes exclusive gazebos, palace interiors, mosques, hotels, private residences, and public buildings delivered across the world.

detail.viewFull: Click an image for full-screen view

gallery.title: Gallery of completed projects worldwide
gallery.description: For over 20 years we have created exclusive works in natural wood for private residences, palaces, mosques, hotels, restaurants, and public spaces. Here are real photographs of our completed projects.

worldMap.title: Our projects by country
worldMap.description: Select a country on the map to view completed World of Wood Decoration projects in that region.
worldMap.noProjects: Projects in this country will appear in the portfolio soon.

videoTestimonials.title: In their own words.
videoTestimonials.description: Clients, architects, and estate managers on what it means to build with our company.

0.author: H.E. Khalid Al-Mansouri
0.quote: They transformed a vision we could barely articulate into a hall that silences everyone who enters.

1.author: Isabelle Laurent
1.quote: Every joint and every grain is considered — the finest joinery I have seen in twenty years.

2.author: Markus Feld
2.quote: Guests pause at the entrance. The reception wall became the signature of the entire hotel.

3.author: Dr. Amina Sharif
3.quote: The craftsmanship honours tradition yet feels alive. It moved our entire community.

4.author: Private client
4.quote: From the first sketch to installation, everything felt effortless and deeply personal.

timeline.title: From first conversation to final installation.
timeline.description: Seven stages that carry a commission from idea to a fully installed interior.

0.title: Client enquiry
0.text: We listen to your architecture, intent, and vision.

1.title: Concept
1.text: Directors shape the concept and material palette.

2.title: 3D design
2.text: Photorealistic 3D models make every detail tangible.

3.title: Production
3.text: Master joiners craft the commission in our workshops.

4.title: Quality control
4.text: Every surface is inspected to the strictest standards.

5.title: Delivery
5.text: Flawless logistics deliver the commission safely to site.

6.title: Installation
6.text: Our teams install and complete the interior on site.

production.title: Full-cycle in-house production
production.description: From the workshop floor to on-site installation — every stage is executed by our team at our own facilities.
production.tagline: We are not just designers. We produce and oversee every stage ourselves.

0.title: Machining
0.text: Calibrated machines saw and mill solid timber to micron precision.

1.title: Hand carving
1.text: Master carvers create ornament, reliefs, and decorative elements by hand.

2.title: Sanding
2.text: Multi-stage sanding reveals the grain and prepares surfaces for finishing.

3.title: Assembly
3.text: Structures are assembled in the workshop with geometry and joint quality checks.

4.title: Lacquering
4.text: Oils and lacquers are applied by hand, layer by layer, for protection and depth of colour.

5.title: Packaging
5.text: Each element is individually packed for safe transport.

6.title: Container loading
6.text: We organise loading and international logistics to the client's site.

7.title: Installation
7.text: Our teams carry out installation and turnkey handover on site.

process.title: From idea to completed project
process.description: The full cycle — from first enquiry to on-site installation. Every stage is overseen by our team.

0.title: Client enquiry
0.text: You submit an enquiry — we record the brief, site, and timeline.

1.title: Consultation
1.text: We hold a consultation to clarify requirements and technical specifications.

2.title: 3D visualization
2.text: We develop 3D visualization and project documentation for approval.

3.title: Production
3.text: We manufacture at our own facility from selected natural timber.

4.title: Quality control
4.text: We conduct multi-stage quality control at every step of production.

5.title: Delivery
5.text: We arrange safe delivery to any location worldwide.

6.title: Installation
6.text: We perform professional installation and turnkey handover on site.

woods.title: Premium natural timber
woods.description: We work only with selected species — for interiors, façades, gazebos, and architectural elements built to last decades.

0.name: Oak
0.note: Strength, monumentality, and noble medullary rays.

1.name: Walnut
1.note: Deep chocolate tone and expressive grain — for luxury interiors and furniture.

2.name: Beech
2.note: Even grain and uniform warm tone for clean architectural forms.

3.name: Ash
3.note: Light warm hue, resilience, and a lively texture pattern.

4.name: Pine
4.note: Light timber with distinctive texture — for pavilions and structures.

5.name: Cedar
5.note: Aromatic, warm texture with natural resistance.

6.name: Abachi
6.note: Light, low-density timber — ideal for décor and Eastern interiors.

materials.title: Timber chosen as a jeweller chooses stones.
materials.description: We work only with wood whose origin, grain, and stability meet standards most houses never see. A selection from our reserve.

whyChooseUs.title: Why clients trust us
whyChooseUs.description: An international production company with full-cycle capability — from concept to on-site installation.

0.title: Over 100 completed projects
0.text: A portfolio of government, commercial, and private buildings worldwide.

1.title: International delivery & installation
1.text: We organise logistics and installation anywhere in the world.

2.title: Work in more than 10 countries
2.text: Experience delivering projects across diverse climates and cultures.

3.title: Full-cycle production
3.text: Design, production, delivery, and installation — under one roof.

4.title: Natural timber only
4.text: We work exclusively with selected solid-wood species.

6.title: Hand artistic carving
6.text: Decorative elements are created by master craftsmen by hand.

7.title: Premium quality
7.text: Multi-stage quality control at every stage of production.

testimonials.title: Trusted by those who commission rarely.

0.quote: They did not deliver joinery. They delivered a heirloom our family will cherish for a century.
0.author: His Excellency, Head of the Royal Court

1.quote: The mihrab they carved became the soul of the mosque. Craft of this level is almost lost to the world.
1.author: Board of the Grand Mosque Waqf

2.quote: Our guests touch the walls. In luxury hospitality, that is the highest praise a material can receive.
2.author: Managing Director

cta.title: Shall we discuss your project?
cta.description: Tell us about your project and we will prepare a bespoke proposal.
cta.note: We respond within one business day.

footer.description: A full-cycle international production company — design, production, delivery, and installation of premium natural wood works.

about.sectionText: We design, produce, and install gazebos, interior solutions, doors, ceilings, columns, furniture, and architectural elements of premium quality for private residences, hotels, restaurants, palaces, mosques, and public buildings.

hero.title: International production company
hero.description: Since 2015 we have brought together the finest joiners, carvers, and finishers — and given them the time that mastery demands.

story.title: Founded on a refusal to compromise.
story.paragraph1: World of Wood Decoration began in a single workshop with a conviction that has never changed: in the right hands, wood can rival marble and gold as a material of great architecture.
story.paragraph2: Three decades later, our projects stand in royal palaces, grand mosques, and landmark hotels across forty-two countries — each made by hand, each signed by the masters who built it.
story.paragraph3: We remain, by choice, a small house. We accept only those commissions we can bring to perfection, and we protect the time our craft requires.

0.title: Craftsmanship
0.text: We hire for a lifetime of craft and give masters the time to reach perfection.

1.title: Provenance
1.text: Every board is traced to a sustainable, responsibly managed source.

2.title: Discretion
2.text: Our clients value privacy above all. Most projects are never named publicly.

3.title: Longevity
3.text: We build to restore and inherit — not to discard.

privacy.title: Privacy & terms.
privacy.description: We treat our clients' information with the same discretion we bring to their commissions.

privacy.heading: Privacy policy
privacy.body: World of Wood Decoration collects only the information you choose to share: your name, contact details, and project details. We use it solely to respond to your enquiry, plan and execute your project, and keep you informed of its progress. Your data is never sold, rented, or disclosed to third parties except trusted partners strictly necessary to fulfil your commission. Much of our work is confidential, and we protect it accordingly.

terms.heading: Terms of use
terms.body: All content on this website — images, text, projects, and marks of World of Wood Decoration — is the property of the company and is provided for personal reference only. Nothing here constitutes a binding offer; each project is governed by a separate written agreement.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body: This website uses only essential cookies for its operation and for a general understanding of how it is used. We do not use advertising trackers. You may disable cookies in your browser at any time; the site will continue to work, though some preferences may not be saved.
